name: Finger lickn' Veggie dip
directions: Put sour cream into medium sized mixing bowl.
Pour in all spices and herbs.
Stir until every spice and herb is mixed in.
Cover and put into refrigerator to chill.
Take out 15 minutes before eating.

similar.name: Fifth Avenue Grill Blue Cheese Coleslaw

name: Versatile flavoured Whippng Cream
directions: Place all iongredients ina large bowl.
using an electric mixer, beat until soft peaks form.
Kepp refrigerated until read to use.

name: icing sugar substitute
directions: Put sugar & cornstarch in blender 1 minute or until powdered.

name: Daiquiri
directions: Put all ingredients in blender except ice cubes.
Cover and process.
Add ice cubes and process some more.
If you want them"frozen" omit the water and add an additional 1 1/2 C ice cubes.

name: Aioli Nouvelle Orleans
directions: Blend the garlic, mayonnaise, and lemon juice in a blender until smooth, then add the rest of the ingredients and blend again.

name: Honey Butter
directions: place butter into small bowl.
Gradually add honey while beating constantly until desired thickness is achieved.

name: Yellow Bell Pepper Soup
directions: Heat oil and butter in a Dutch oven; sauté the peppers, onion, potato and garlic for about five minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add broth, bay leaf, salt and pepper, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Discard bay leaf.
Cool slightly; puree in batches in blender.
Return to pan.
Stir in buttermilk, heat through.
Serve hot or cold; garnish with a dollop of sour cream or yogurt and a pinch of chives, if desired.

similar.name: California Pizza Kitchen's Dakota Smashed Pea & Barley Soup

name: Pupsicles
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender and pour into paper cups (I fill them about halfway and get 12).
Place cups into a muffin pan and freeze for 4 hours or more.
When ready to serve, tear off the cup and put the pupsicle in a bowl for your dog.

name: California Pizza Kitchen's Dakota Smashed Pea & Barley Soup
directions: Rinse and sort the split peas.
Add them to a large pot with 6 cups of water, chicken broth, onion, garlic, lemon juice, salt, sugar, parsley, pepper, and thyme.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 1-1 1/2 hours or until the peas are soft.
While the peas are cooking, combine the barley with 6 cups of water in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 1-1 1/2 hours or until the barley is soft and most of the water has been absorbed.
When the split pea mixture has become a thick soup, use a handheld blender to puree the peas until the mixture is smooth.
A standard blender or food processor may also be used to puree the soup in batches.
This step may also be omitted.
Drain the the remaining water from the barley and add the barley to the split pea mixture.
Add the carrots and celery and continue to simmer the soup for 15 to 30 minutes or until the carrots are tender, stirring occasionally.
Turn off the heat, cover the soup, and let sit for 10 to 15 minutes before serving.
Garnish each serving with the snipped green onion.

name: Italian Avocado Salad
directions: In an electric blender, mix lime juice and basil, and allow to set for 5 minutes.
Add garlic, mayonnaise, salt, pepper and parsley, and blend until smooth, scraping sides of container as needed.
Pit, peel and cube 1 avocado.
Add to blender, and blend until smooth.
Adjust salt and pepper to taste, cover dressing, and chill for 1-2 hours.
Just before serving, line serving platter or individual plates with lettuce.
Pit, peel and slice remaining avocados.
Arrange with tomatoes on lettuce leaves.
Top with avocado dressing mixture, and garnish with watercress or parsley.
Dressing also makes a great dip for vegetables.

name: Roasting Salt Blend for Veggies or Meats
directions: Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender and blend 30 seconds until well combined.
Store in an airtight container along with your other herbs& spices.
How to use: Sprinkle some over lightly oiled veggies or meats before roasting or grilling.

name: Ancho Chile and Citrus Ketchup
directions: Squeeze the Ketchup into a blender.
Add the chili powder and the zests.
Blend 'til smooth.
Pour into a zip lock bag, scrap the blender with a rubber spatula.
Seal bag, cut one of the bottom corners from the bag and pipe the ketchup back into its bottle.
It's best to let the flavors meld at least overnight.
Use as you would regular ketchup.
It's especially good with wings, fries, and/or onion rings.
Spread on a grilled cheese sandwich it's something else.
You get the idea.
Try it on just about everything, it will probably work.

name: Honey-Mustard Poppy Seed Dressing
directions: Combine vinegar, Dijon, and honey in blender container.
Process on low till blended.
Add oil in a slow stream till thickened.
Remove from blender, add poppy seeds; chill.

name: Honey Almond Butter
directions: In a small mixing bowl, cream the butter, honey, brown sugar and extract until light and fluffy.
Transfer to a bowl with a tight fighting lid and refrigerate until chilled.
If you prefer, you can place the creamed butter mixture on a sheet of plastic wrap; roll into a log and refrigerate until chilled.
Unwrap and slice as desired or place on a butter dish.

name: Simple Banana-Mango
directions: Cut banana in pieces and put in the blender.
Cut the mango in 4 pieces. Put 1 piece in the blender.
Then take a teaspoon with sugar and drop it into the blender.
I don't know if 1DL milk is correct, just a little bit for the taste.
If you want, it's optional, you can put 3 ice-cubes in it :).

name: Applesauce Cinnamon Salad
directions: Place red jello, boiling water and Red Hots in blender. Start on low speed and increase speed untill all candies are dissolved. In large bowl combine previous mixture, cold water,applesauce, lemon juice and salt.
Chill at least 6 hours in 9 x 13 or large ring mold.

name: Herb Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender.
Warm gently before spooning on fish or vegetables.

name: Fire Roasted Salsa
directions: roast all ingredients except garlic and cilantro on the grill till cooked through and slightly blackened.
chop onions and cilantro in food processor; set aside.
when all the ingredients on the grill are thoroughly cooked, chop in food processor.
combine all ingredients together.
serve hot or cold.

name: Black Olive Tapenade With Rosemary and Plum Jam
directions: Place all ingredients except for olive oil in food processor or blender. Blend until smooth.
Slowly pour in olive oil while slowly blending.

name: Roasted Pepper-Salt Blend
directions: In a heavy skillet, combine the salt with 1 of the options given.
Toast over moderate heat, stirring constantly, until the salt turns off-white.  This should take about 5 minutes.
Adjust heat as necessary to keep the peppercorns or chili for burning being careful as both the chili and peppercorns will pop during this process.
Remove the mixture from heat and allow to cool somewhat.
Place the ingredients in a clean coffee or spice grinder and blend until a fine powder.
Sift through a sieve to remove any husks or debris.
Store mix in a clean dry jar with a tight fighting lid.

similar.name: Roasting Salt Blend for Veggies or Meats

name: Creamy Avocado Soup
directions: Process avocado in a blender or food processor until mixture is smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Add chopped cilantro and next 9 ingredients, and process until mixture is smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Pour into a large bowl; stir in chicken broth and sour cream.
Cover and chill 3 hours.
Tip:
* 1 (16-ounce) container light sour cream may be substituted.
Makes 8 cups.

name: Fifth Avenue Grill Blue Cheese Coleslaw
directions: In a large mixing bowl, toss all the ingredients gently but thoroughly together until well coated with the dressing.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving to allow the ingredients to meld.
Toss again before serving and serve well chilled.

similar.name: California Pizza Kitchen's Dakota Smashed Pea & Barley Soup

name: Kickoff Pepper Dip
directions: In a blender or large food processor, combine about one-third of the cut up sweet peppers, the onion, and the water. Cover and blend or process until smooth. Add the remaining cut up peppers; cover and blend until smooth.
Place pureed vegetable mixture in a fine sieve; press mixture gently to drain off excess liquid. Set aside.

In a medium bowl, combine cream cheese, mayonnaise dressing, lemon juice, oil, horseradish, salt, and hot pepper sauce. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed. Beat in pureed vegetable mixture. Cover and chill for at least 4 hours or up to 12 hours.

Tote dip, sweet pepper shells (if using), and vegetable dippers (if using) in an insulated cooler with ice packs. If desired, spoon dip into the sweet pepper shells. Serve with vegetable dippers and/or breadsticks.

name: Strawberry Jam (Bread Machine)
directions: If frozen, thaw completely.
Crush berries with fork or potato masher, do NOT puree them.
Put berries and sugar into pan of machine.
Follow the directions for your machine for the jam cycle.
Do NOT alter the ingredient quantities or this will NOT set right.

name: Transylvania Mashed Potatoes
directions: Wash and peel potatoes. Place in large pot and cover with lightly salted water. Bring to boil over medium heat and cook until easily penetrated by fork. Do not overcook.
Melt butter in small saucepan. Peel garlic and add to butter over low heat, cooking until tender. Do not let garlic burn. When garlic is tender add cream and black pepper, heat almost to a boil.
Drain water from potatoes and mash with a fork or potato masher. Add just enough chicken broth to break down potatoes.
Place garlic mixture in a blender or food processor and puree. Once this step is complete slowly add the mixture to the potatoes and beat with an electric hand mixer until smooth, and serve.

name: Melsmom's Sofrito
directions: Rinse cilantro.
Roughly chop the green peppers, red peppers and Spanish onions.
In your food processor or blender, mince all your ingredients in batches.
Mix the sofrito.
You can store in glass jars in your refrigerator or freeze it in ice cube trays. When the sofrito is frozen, transfer it to ziploc freezer bags.
Use a tablespoon at a time or to taste in sauces, meats, beans and more to enhance the flavor of your food.

name: Simon & Garfunkel Rub
directions: Measure everything into a blender.

Put the lid on the blender, and run it on high for a few seconds, turn it off, and run it again; continue pulsing about 10 times until you have small flakes about the size of the letters in a newspaper.
Place in a jar with a tightly sealed lid.

similar.name: Roasting Salt Blend for Veggies or Meats

name: Vanilla Whipped Cream
directions: Beat the cream with an electric mixer until it thickens.
Add sugar and vanilla extract.
Continue to beat with mixer until cream stiffens or peaks form.
Refrigerate.

name: Thermomix Minestrone
directions: Place the vegetables (minus the peas, garlic and onion) into the TM bowl. Chop 5 seconds/speed 4. Tip out, add the peas and set aside.
Place garlic and onion in TM bowl. Mince 2 seconds/speed 5.
Add oil and meat. Cook 5 minutes/100 degrees/speed 2.
Add stock. Cook 8 minutes/100 degrees/speed 2.
Return all the vegetables, the tomato puree, pasta shapes, and salt and pepper to taste to the TM bowl. Cook 15 minutes/100 degrees/reverse/speed 1.
Pour into 4 bowls and top with the chopped parsley.

similar.name: California Pizza Kitchen's Dakota Smashed Pea & Barley Soup

name: Sesame-Crusted Swordfish
directions: In a shallow dish, combine all the ingredients except the swordfish and sesame seeds.  Mix well.  Add the swordfish and coat completely.  Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 2 hours, turning occasionally.
Coat a grill pan with nonstick cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat.

Remove the swordfish from the marinade; discard the marinade.  Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes, turn the fish, sprinkle with sesame sees, and grill for 4-5 more minutes, or until it flakes easily with a fork.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Black Olive Tapenade With Rosemary and Plum Jam
Fifth Avenue Grill Blue Cheese Coleslaw

name: Microwave Sweet Potato Casserole
directions: Grease an 8 X 8-inch microwave and oven proof glass baking dish with some coconut oil.
Layer in the sweet potato slices in oiled baking dish.
Mix 2 tablespoons coconut oil, brown and white sugars, orange zest, orange juice and salt in a one cup liquid measuring cup or small bowl.

Pour mixture over sweet potatoes. Tightly cover with saran wrap. Microwave for 10-12 minutes or until the potatoes are done. Let sit for a minute and carefully remove saran wrap. (Steam will escape and will be very hot. Be careful not to steam burn yourself).

Just before serving, top with marshmallows and bake on the top rack ( at least 4-5 inches away from the heat source) at a 450 degree oven for about 5-6 minutes or until the marshmallows are the color you like.
